description: CRIT-703 demands fast-check property tests `each pass >=100 fast-check runs`, but the actual reducer/predicates/debounce tests in the repository are example-based bun:test assertions, not fast-check properties. For instance `editorReducer.test.ts` line 17 imports `from 'bun:test'`; line 109-140 enumerates a small fixed cross-product (5 statuses × 10 sample actions = 50 cases), not a randomised property exploration. There are no `fc.assert` invocations, no `fc.property` declarations, no `numRuns: 100` configuration anywhere in the editor `__tests__/`. The CRIT-703 quantitative requirement (>=100 fast-check runs) cannot be satisfied by the present implementation; either fast-check files must actually be authored, or the criterion must be relaxed to example-based coverage with a fixed argument cross-product.
